$comment: Baseline for @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any ratchet. Do not increase these numbers.

production.note: Includes both `as any` casts (~851) and `: any` annotations (~665). Multiple per line possible.

test.note: Rule is disabled for test files (**/test/**, **/*.test.ts, **/tests/**)

ratchetPlan.phase1: warn — current. Prevents new any from sneaking in via code review awareness.
ratchetPlan.phase2: CI max-warnings threshold — set --max-warnings=2142, ratchet down as fixes land.
ratchetPlan.phase3: error — once production count reaches 0, promote to error.
